hole_ref: c6/c7 H5 — Devil's Sea latitude cherry-pick
summary: Duplicate routing of c6/c7 H5 (Devil's Sea latitude cherry-pick) — canonical is ISS-1938 (PATCH-323-A in EXP-323 verification batch 7). c7 review explicitly recommended consolidating this triplet (ISS-1938+1941+1954) into a single close. Recommend close as duplicate-of ISS-1938.
